persona.name: Jason Miller
persona.motivations_goals: Excel in sports while maintaining good grades and social status
persona.communication_style: Direct, enthusiastic, sometimes talks over others
persona.backstory: Local kid who's been popular since elementary school, comes from a family of athletes

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey Karen, you ready for the tryouts next week? I’ve been practicing my three-pointers like crazy.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Mason Scott

surrounding_conversation.content: Mason! You ready to crush it later? We’re gonna dominate!
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Jason Miller

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

actions.dialog_text: Hey Karen, what's going on? You ready for the game later?
actions.plan: Karen is here, maybe I should chat with her and see what's up. She's usually pretty fun to talk to.

actions.dialog_text: Mason! You ready to crush it later? We’re gonna dominate!
actions.plan: Mason just walked in. He's on the team too, so maybe I should include him in the conversation. It’s always good to keep the team spirit up.

actions.dialog_text: Guys, get down! I heard a gunshot. Stay quiet and don’t move.
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot! I need to take cover immediately. Moving might make things worse, so I’ll stay here and hide.

actions.dialog_text: Mason, stay down and don’t make any noise. We’ll be okay if we stay hidden.
actions.plan: The shooter is still in the building, and I’m not sure where Karen went. I need to stay hidden and not draw attention to myself.

actions.dialog_text: Mason, don’t panic. Just stay down and stay quiet. We’ll get through this.
actions.plan: The shooter is getting closer, but moving might make things worse. I’ll stay here and keep Mason calm. We’ll be safer if we stay hidden.

memories.description: I saw Karen in the classroom and decided to strike up a conversation about the upcoming game.
Mason entered the classroom, and I decided to hype him up for the game later to keep the team spirit high.
I heard a gunshot and decided to take cover in the classroom, urging Karen and Mason to stay down and quiet.
The shooter is still in the building, and I’m staying hidden in the classroom, urging Mason to stay quiet and still.
The shooter is getting closer, but I decided to stay hidden in the classroom and keep Mason calm to avoid drawing attention.
